title: MagicWipe® Microfibre Cloth - 2 Pack 30 x 40 cm Dual Sided Cleaning Cloth - 600 GSM All Purpose Streak Free Diamond Wave Polishing Cloth for Kitchen Worktops, Glass, Mirrors, Bathrooms, Car
features: Ultra Absorbent & Quick Drying: MAGIC WIPE large microfibre cloth soaks up water instantly and dries faster than standard towels, making it perfect for shower cubicles, cars, household cleaning, and camping. Made of 80% Polyester, and 20% Polyamide making them perfect for quickly soaking up water from the countertop and tables without leaving lint or streaks behind.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Lint Free, Long Lasting, Quick Dry, Streak Free, Super Absorbent
